steps.title: VORTEX samples to mix INCUBATE samples...
steps.instruction: VORTEX samples to mix INCUBATE samples at 94 °C for 00:50:00

steps.title: ALLOW samples to cool to Room...
steps.instruction: ALLOW samples to cool to Room temperature CENTRIFUGE at 5000 x g for 00:00:30

steps.title: PLACE 9
steps.instruction: PLACE 9.0 g of sediment sample into a 50 mL tube ADD 6 mL NaOH ADD 3 mL TE buffer ADD 500 µL G2 enhancer Sediment volume can be adjusted but reagent volumes should remain the same

steps.title: TRANSFER 7
steps.instruction: TRANSFER 7.5 mL of supernatant to a new 50 mL tube NEUTRALIZE by adding 7.5 mL Tris-HCL (1M)

steps.title: ADD 1
steps.instruction: ADD 1.5 mL sodium acetate VORTEX well to mix

steps.title: INCUBATE at -20 °C for at...
steps.instruction: INCUBATE at -20 °C for at least 01:00:00 Incubation at -20 °C Overnight is recommended

steps.title: WIPE off condensation from around the...
steps.instruction: WIPE off condensation from around the 50 mL tube and centrifuge at 5,350xG for 20 min CENTRIFUGE at 5350 x g for 00:20:00

steps.title: DISCARD supernatant and leave the tube...
steps.instruction: DISCARD supernatant and leave the tube mouth down for a few minutes TRANSFER the precipitate to a PowerBead Tube (Qiagen Kit) DISSOLVE the remaining precipitate with 100 µL of DW then transfer to the PowerBead Tube

steps.title: ADD 60 µL of Solution C1...
steps.instruction: ADD 60 µL of Solution C1 VORTEX at max speed for 00:10:00 CENTRIFUGE at 10000 x g for 00:00:30 Vortex for 15-20 minutes if you have more than 12 samples

steps.title: TRANSFER supernatant to a new 2...
steps.instruction: TRANSFER supernatant to a new 2 mL tube Expect ~700ul of supernatant, but the more supernatant transferred, the better

steps.title: ADD 250 µL of Solution C2...
steps.instruction: ADD 250 µL of Solution C2 VORTEX briefly to mix INCUBATE at 4 °C for 00:05:00 CENTRIFUGE at 10000 x g 00:01:00

steps.title: TRANSFER 600 µL of supernatant to...
steps.instruction: TRANSFER 600 µL of supernatant to a new 2 mL tube ADD 200 µL of Solution C3 VORTEX briefly to mix INCUBATE at 4 °C for 00:05:00 CENTRIFUGE at 10000 x g for 00:01:00

steps.title: TRANSFER 750 µL of supernatant to...
steps.instruction: TRANSFER 750 µL of supernatant to a new 2 mL tube ADD 1.2 mL of Solution C4 VORTEX well to mix

steps.title: TRANSFER 675 µL to a Spin...
steps.instruction: TRANSFER 675 µL to a Spin Filter CENTRIFUGE at 10000 x g for 00:01:00 DISCARD the liquid filtrate

steps.title: REPEAT the above step until all...
steps.instruction: REPEAT the above step until all liquid has passed through the Spin Filter

steps.title: ADD 500 µL of Solution C5...
steps.instruction: ADD 500 µL of Solution C5 to the Spin Filter CENTRIFUGE at 10000 x g for 00:00:30 DISCARD the liquid filtrate

steps.title: TRANSFER the Spin Filter to a new 1
steps.instruction: TRANSFER the Spin Filter to a new 1.5 mL tube ADD 100 µL of Solution C6 to the Spin Filter LET stand for 00:01:00 CENTRIFUGE at 10000 x g for 00:00:30

steps.title: DISCARD the Spin Filter DNA is...
steps.instruction: DISCARD the Spin Filter DNA is now ready for downstream applications

steps.title: ADD 30 mL of ethanol VORTEX well to mix
steps.instruction: ADD 30 mL of ethanol VORTEX well to mix
